parsed.production_notes: The main speaker is an AI avatar with unnatural lip-syncing and stiff movements. Background characters are perfectly static images. POV phone shots appear to be AI-generated hands with composited screen recordings.

characters.appearance: Young South Asian male, slim build, short dark hair. Clean-shaven.
characters.wardrobe: White button-down shirt and a solid blue tie.

characters.appearance: Middle-aged South Asian male, average build, short dark hair.
Middle-aged South Asian male, average build, short dark hair, wearing glasses.

scenes.setting: Auditorium stage, wooden podium, red curtain background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man stands behind a wooden podium, speaking into a microphone. Behind him to the left stands an older man with his hands clasped. The background consists of heavy, dark red theatrical curtains. The lighting is focused on the speaker, creating a stage-like atmosphere.

scenes.visual_description: A young man delivers a speech from a podium on a stage with red curtains. A static man stands behind him. Captions appear at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: আজ থেকে যে রোজ ইংলিশ প্র্যাকটিস করবে সে BMW তে ঘুরবে। আর যে করবে না সে টেম্পো চালাবে। [From today, whoever practices English daily will ride in a BMW. And whoever doesn't will drive a tempo.]
Character A says: এবার বলো কোর্স করতে হবে, ডিগ্রি লাগবে, অনেক টাকা লাগবে, বাড়িতে এত বাজেট নেই। [Now you'll say, I have to do a course, I need a degree, it will cost a lot of money, there isn't that much budget at home.]
Character A says: এগুলো সব excuse! আমি যা বলছি তার জন্য বেশি টাকা লাগবে না। [These are all excuses! What I am saying won't cost much money.]
Character A says: শুধু একটা কাজ ইংলিশ শিখো app download করো। [Just do one thing, download the English Seekho app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
আজ থেকে যে রোজ ইংলিশ
প্র্যাকটিস করবে সে
BMW তে ঘুরবে। আর যে
করবে না সে টেম্পো
চালাবে। এবার বলো
কোর্স করতে হবে,
ডিগ্রি লাগবে, অনেক
টাকা লাগবে। বাড়িতে
এত বাজেট নেই। এগুলো
সব excuse! আমি যা
বলছি তার জন্য বেশি
টাকা লাগবে না। শুধু
একটা কাজ ইংলিশ শিখো
app download করো।

panels.panel_visual_description: A digital interface displaying a grid of portrait-oriented video thumbnails. The thumbnails feature various individuals, including a young woman with glasses, a young woman looking upwards, and a man with a beard, all appearing to speak directly to the viewer. The background of the interface is dark.

scenes.visual_description: A screen recording of a mobile app. It shows a grid of video thumbnails featuring different people. Captions overlay the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: ভাবছো এই app টা কি? [Thinking what this app is?]
Character A says: এই app এ একটা AI coach আছে যে তোমাকে step by step ইংলিশ শেখায়। [This app has an AI coach that teaches you English step by step.]
Character A says: প্রথমে basic, yes, no, I, am, was, were সব clear। [First basic, yes, no, I, am, was, were all clear.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
ভাবছো এই app টা কি?
এই app এ একটা AI coach
আছে যে তোমাকে step
by step ইংলিশ
শেখায়। প্রথমে

scenes.setting: Auditorium stage, wooden podium, red curtain background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man stands behind a wooden podium, speaking into a microphone. Behind him to the left stands an older man with his hands clasped. The background consists of heavy, dark red theatrical curtains. The lighting is focused on the speaker.

scenes.visual_description: The young man continues his speech from the podium. The static man remains behind him. Captions appear at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: তারপর sentence, I am going to the market, Today I am going to the market to buy vegetables। [Then sentence, I am going to the market, Today I am going to the market to buy vegetables.]
Character A says: জিরো থেকে fluent সব এক জায়গায়। [From zero to fluent all in one place.]
Character A says: এবার শোনো, তারপর আরও বড় ফোনে কি করো? Reels দেখো, [Now listen, then what else do you do on your big phone? Watch Reels,]
scenes.on_screen_text:
sentence, I am going
to the market,
Today I am going to
the market to buy
vegetables। জিরো

scenes.setting: Auditorium stage, wooden podium, red curtain background.

panels.panel_visual_description: A young man stands behind a wooden podium, speaking into a microphone. Behind him, two older men stand motionless, one on the left and one on the right. The background consists of heavy, dark red theatrical curtains. The lighting highlights the speaker.

scenes.visual_description: The young man concludes his speech at the podium. A second static man has appeared on the right side of the frame. Captions appear at the bottom.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: এটা বন্ধ করো। Instagram delete করো, ইংলিশ শিখো app খোলো। [Stop this. Delete Instagram, open the English Seekho app.]
Character A says: রোজ পনেরো মিনিট দাও, ব্যাস একমাস পরে দেখবে তোমার ইংলিশ next level। [Give fifteen minutes daily, that's it, after a month you will see your English is next level.]
Character A says: ইংলিশ শিখতে হলে রোজ practice করতেই হবে। [To learn English you have to practice daily.]
Character A says: আর তার জন্য সবচেয়ে easy রাস্তা [And the easiest way for that is]
scenes.on_screen_text:
এটা বন্ধ করো।
Instagram delete
করো, ইংলিশ শিখো app
খোলো। রোজ পনেরো
মিনিট দাও, ব্যাস
একমাস পরে দেখবে
তোমার ইংলিশ next
level। ইংলিশ শিখতে
হলে রোজ practice
করতেই হবে। আর তার
জন্য সবচেয়ে easy
রাস্তা

scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: ইংলিশ শিখো app [English Seekho app]

panels.panel_visual_description: A black smartphone stands upright against a solid white background. The phone's screen is completely black.

scenes.visual_description: A graphic end card featuring a smartphone displaying the app logo on a white background. An install button is below the phone. Captions overlay the screen.
scenes.audio_transcript: Character A says: এখুনি দেরি না করে install now এ ক্লিক করো আর ইংলিশ শিখো app download করে নাও। [Without delay click on install now and download the English Seekho app.]
scenes.on_screen_text:
এখুনি দেরি না করে
install now এ ক্লিক করো
আর ইংলিশ শিখো app
download করে নাও।
english
INSTALL NOW

scenes.visual_description: A solid black screen with a block of white disclaimer text.
scenes.on_screen_text:
English Seekho kisi bhi government authority
institution brand, organisation ya individual
ke dwara endorsed, sponsored, affiliated ya
associated nahi hai. Kisi bhi names trademarks
logos ya references ka use sirf educational
aur informational purposes ke liye kiya gaya hai
Kuch content sirf samjhane ke liye dramatised ya
representational ho sakta hai English Seekho
kisi bhi guaranteed results ka promise nahi karta
Outcomes individual effort aur doosre factors par
depend karte hain aur
vary kar sakte hain.
